result.summary: DaniWeb exposes OAuth2-protected Connect HTTP APIs for v2, v3, and v4; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was found.

daniweb_oauth_access_token.label: DaniWeb Connect OAuth access token
daniweb_oauth_access_token.setup:
1. Register a DaniWeb app at [Manage Your Apps](https://www.daniweb.com/connect/developers/apps/register).
2. Configure your redirect URI(s) for the app.
3. Have the user authorize your app at the DaniWeb Connect OAuth authorize URL shown in the docs, then exchange the code for an access token.
4. Use the resulting `access_token` in `Authorization: Bearer ...` for Connect API calls. Tokens are temporary and last about 24 hours.
